violations.text: The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The ceiling in the front prep area, ceiling in the back food prep area, and ceiling in the back ware-washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

The ceiling in the front prep area, ceiling in the back food prep area, and ceiling in the back ware-washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024
Some floor tiles observed cracked in the back prep area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Tiles must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024
Insufficient lighting observed in the walk-in cooler. Bulb to be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

The front case was observed held at 57 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. -Service was contacted. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

The ceiling in the back food prep area and ceiling in the back ware-washing area observed with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. -Finished materials handout provided to establishment. Ceiling tiles must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

Some floor tiles in the back prep area observed in poor repair. Tiles observed chipped and cracked. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. -Finished materials handout provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024

Insufficient lighting observed in the walk-in cooler. Lighting 6-303.11 Intensity. The light intensity shall be: (A) At least 108 lux (10 foot candles) at a distance of 75 cm (30 inches) above the floor, in walk-in refrigeration units and dry FOOD storage areas and in other areas and rooms during periods of cleaning. Lighting 6-303.11 Intensity. Lighting levels are specified so that sufficient light is available to enable employees to perform certain functions such as reading labels; discerning the color of substances; identifying toxic materials; recognizing the condition of food, utensils, and supplies; and safely conducting general food establishment operations and clean-up. Properly distributed light makes the need for cleaning apparent by making accumulations of soil conspicuous. -Light bulb to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024
